name: Number 8: Heraldic King Genom-Heritage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>８ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>章</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゲノム・ヘリター
desc:
2 Level 4 "Heraldic Beast" monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up Xyz Monster your opponent controls; this card's name and original ATK become that monster's original name and current ATK, also replace this effect with that monster's original effects, then that monster's ATK becomes 0, also its effects are negated. This effect applies until the End Phase.

This effect applies until the End Phase.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
